accepted_if: The :key must be accepted when :other is :value.
active_url: The :key is not a valid URL.
after: The :key must be a date after :date.
after_or_equal: The :key must be a date after or equal to :date.
alpha_dash: The :key must only contain letters, numbers, dashes and underscores.
alpha_num: The :key must only contain letters and numbers.
before: The :key must be a date before :date.
before_or_equal: The :key must be a date before or equal to :date.

between.file: The :key must be between :min and :max kilobytes.
between.string: The :key must be between :min and :max characters.
between.array: The :key must have between :min and :max items.

boolean: The :key field must be true or false.
date: The :key is not a valid date.
date_equals: The :key must be a date equal to :date.
date_format: The :key does not match the format :format.
declined_if: The :key must be declined when :other is :value.
digits_between: The :key must be between :min and :max digits.
distinct: The :key field has a duplicate value.
email: The :key must be a valid email address.
ends_with: The :key must end with one of the following: :values.
filled: The :key field must have a value.

gt.file: The :key must be greater than :value kilobytes.
gt.string: The :key must be greater than :value characters.
gt.array: The :key must have more than :value items.

gte.numeric: The :key must be greater than or equal to :value.
gte.file: The :key must be greater than or equal to :value kilobytes.
gte.string: The :key must be greater than or equal to :value characters.
gte.array: The :key must have :value items or more.

in_array: The :key field does not exist in :other.
ip: The :key must be a valid IP address.
ipv4: The :key must be a valid IPv4 address.
ipv6: The :key must be a valid IPv6 address.
json: The :key must be a valid JSON string.

lt.file: The :key must be less than :value kilobytes.
lt.string: The :key must be less than :value characters.
lt.array: The :key must have less than :value items.

lte.numeric: The :key must be less than or equal to :value.
lte.file: The :key must be less than or equal to :value kilobytes.
lte.string: The :key must be less than or equal to :value characters.
lte.array: The :key must not have more than :value items.

mac_address: The :key must be a valid MAC address.

max.numeric: The :key must not be greater than :max.
max.file: The :key must not be greater than :max kilobytes.
max.string: The :key must not be greater than :max characters.
max.array: The :key must not have more than :max items.

mimes: The :key must be a file of type: :values.
mimetypes: The :key must be a file of type: :values.

min.file: The :key must be at least :min kilobytes.
min.string: The :key must be at least :min characters.
min.array: The :key must have at least :min items.

multiple_of: The :key must be a multiple of :value.
prohibited_if: The :key field is prohibited when :other is :value.
required_array_keys: The :key field must contain entries for: :values.
required_if: The :key field is required when :other is :value.
required_unless: The :key field is required unless :other is in :values.
required_with: The :key field is required when :values is present.
required_with_all: The :key field is required when :values are present.
required_without: The :key field is required when :values is not present.
required_without_all: The :key field is required when none of :values are present.
starts_with: The :key must start with one of the following: :values.
timezone: The :key must be a valid timezone.
url: The :key must be a valid URL.
uuid: The :key must be a valid UUID.
